items.question: How much can I earn from free trials?
items.answer: Each free trial pays between $5 and $50. Most members earn $100-$300 per month, but active users can earn $500+ by completing 10-20 trials monthly. Streaming and software trials typically pay the most.

items.question: Is it really free? Will I be charged?
items.answer: Yes, free trials are truly free. You will only be charged if you forget to cancel before the trial ends. Always set a calendar reminder to cancel on time. Use virtual cards for extra protection.

items.question: How do I get paid for completing free trials?
items.answer: You can cash out via PayPal, bank transfer, Bitcoin, Ethereum, or gift cards (Amazon, Apple, Google Play, Robux, Steam, Xbox, PlayStation). Minimum payout is just $5.

items.question: Do I need a credit card?
items.answer: Most free trials require a credit or debit card for verification. You can use virtual cards from services like Privacy.com for added security.

items.question: How do I cancel my free trial?
items.answer: Each offer includes cancellation instructions. Most can be cancelled online from your account settings. Always cancel at least 24 hours before the trial ends.

items.question: Is Cashog available in my country?
items.answer: Cashog is available in over 50 countries including the US, Canada, UK, Australia, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, and many more. Free trial availability varies by region. Sign up to see offers in {country}.
